message:
test(conformance): golden vectors for capability tokens, holder proofs, signing

Add normative golden vector modules for three protocol areas:

- capability.rs (415 lines): CapabilityTokenGoldenVector with byte-exact
  COSE_Sign1 encoding tests for capability token issuance/verification
- holder_proof.rs (303 lines): HolderProofGoldenVector with signable-bytes
  derivation and proof structure validation
- signing.rs (381 lines): SigningBytesGoldenVector for canonicalization +
  QuorumSortGoldenVector for deterministic quorum signature ordering

Expanded crypto test suite:
- crypto_expanded_golden_vectors.rs (807 lines): comprehensive test
  harness exercising HPKE, COSE, canonicalization golden vectors
- vectors/canonicalize/: canonical CBOR encoding test data
- vectors/cose/: COSE capability token vector JSON
- vectors/hpke/: HPKE encryption/decryption test data

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,101 @@
+{
+  "_comment": "Golden vectors for FCP2 canonical signing-bytes procedure",
+  "_version": "1.0.0",
+  "_generated": "2026-02-27",
+  "_sources": [
+    "FCP2 spec: signing-bytes = SIGNING_DOMAIN || schema_hash || cbor_bytes",
+    "schema_hash = BLAKE3(schema_id)[0..8]",
+    "SIGNING_DOMAIN = b\"FCP2-SIGN-V1\""
+  ],
+
+  "constants": {
+    "signing_domain_ascii": "FCP2-SIGN-V1",
+    "signing_domain_hex": "464350322d5349474e2d5631",
+    "schema_hash_size": 8,
+    "signing_domain_size": 12
+  },
+
+  "schema_hash_vectors": [
+    {
+      "name": "capability_object",
+      "schema_id": "fcp.core.CapabilityObject/1.0.0",
+      "expected_hash_hex": "28cb6f0e02d0c489"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "operation_intent",
+      "schema_id": "fcp.core.OperationIntent/1.0.0",
+      "expected_hash_hex": "__GENERATE__"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "operation_receipt",
+      "schema_id": "fcp.core.OperationReceipt/1.0.0",
+      "expected_hash_hex": "__GENERATE__"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "audit_event",
+      "schema_id": "fcp.core.AuditEvent/1.0.0",
+      "expected_hash_hex": "__GENERATE__"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "event_envelope",
+      "schema_id": "fcp.core.EventEnvelope/1.0.0",
+      "expected_hash_hex": "__GENERATE__"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "zone_key_manifest",
+      "schema_id": "fcp.zone.ZoneKeyManifest/1.0.0",
+      "expected_hash_hex": "__GENERATE__"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "zone_definition",
+      "schema_id": "fcp.zone.ZoneDefinition/1.0.0",
+      "expected_hash_hex": "__GENERATE__"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "gossip_summary",
+      "schema_id": "fcp.mesh.GossipSummary/1.0.0",
+      "expected_hash_hex": "__GENERATE__"
+    }
+  ],
+
+  "schema_hash_properties": [
+    {
+      "name": "version_sensitivity",
+      "description": "Changing any version component changes the hash",
+      "schema_id_a": "fcp.core.CapabilityObject/1.0.0",
+      "schema_id_b": "fcp.core.CapabilityObject/1.0.1",
+      "expected": "different_hashes"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "namespace_sensitivity",
+      "description": "Changing namespace changes the hash",
+      "schema_id_a": "fcp.core.CapabilityObject/1.0.0",
+      "schema_id_b": "fcp.mesh.CapabilityObject/1.0.0",
+      "expected": "different_hashes"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "name_sensitivity",
+      "description": "Changing name changes the hash",
+      "schema_id_a": "fcp.core.CapabilityObject/1.0.0",
+      "schema_id_b": "fcp.core.OperationIntent/1.0.0",
+      "expected": "different_hashes"
+    }
+  ],
+
+  "signing_bytes_vectors": [
+    {
+      "name": "capability_object_empty_cbor",
+      "description": "Signing bytes for CapabilityObject with empty CBOR payload",
+      "schema_id": "fcp.core.CapabilityObject/1.0.0",
+      "cbor_hex": "",
+      "expected_signing_bytes_hex": "464350322d5349474e2d563128cb6f0e02d0c489"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "capability_object_minimal_cbor",
+      "description": "Signing bytes with a minimal CBOR map {\"test\": true}",
+      "schema_id": "fcp.core.CapabilityObject/1.0.0",
+      "cbor_hex": "a16474657374f5",
+      "expected_signing_bytes_hex": "__GENERATE__"
+    }
+  ]
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,116 @@
+{
+  "_comment": "Golden vectors for FCP2 COSE_Sign1 capability tokens with deterministic Ed25519 signatures",
+  "_version": "1.0.0",
+  "_generated": "2026-02-27",
+  "_sources": [
+    "RFC 8152 COSE_Sign1 with EdDSA",
+    "RFC 8392 CWT claims",
+    "FCP2 custom claims in negative key range",
+    "Key: RFC 8032 §7.1 Test Vector 1"
+  ],
+
+  "signing_key": {
+    "description": "RFC 8032 Test Vector 1 key pair used for deterministic token generation",
+    "secret_key_hex": "9d61b19deffd5a60ba844af492ec2cc44449c5697b326919703bac031cae7f60",
+    "public_key_hex": "d75a980182b10ab7d54bfed3c964073a0ee172f3daa62325af021a68f707511a",
+    "key_id_hex": "__GENERATE__"
+  },
+
+  "cwt_claim_keys": {
+    "description": "Standard CWT (RFC 8392) and FCP2 private claim keys",
+    "standard": {
+      "iss": 1,
+      "sub": 2,
+      "aud": 3,
+      "exp": 4,
+      "nbf": 5,
+      "iat": 6,
+      "cti": 7
+    },
+    "fcp2_private": {
+      "CAPABILITY_ID": -65537,
+      "ZONE_ID": -65538,
+      "OPERATIONS": -65539,
+      "PRINCIPAL_ID": -65540,
+      "DELEGATION_DEPTH": -65541,
+      "PARENT_TOKEN": -65542,
+      "ISS_NODE": -65543,
+      "AUD_BINARY": -65544,
+      "GRANT_OBJECT_IDS": -65545,
+      "HOLDER_NODE": -65546,
+      "CHK_ID": -65547,
+      "CHK_SEQ": -65548,
+      "CONSTRAINTS": -65549,
+      "GRANTS": -65550,
+      "INSTANCE_ID": -65551
+    }
+  },
+
+  "token_vectors": [
+    {
+      "name": "minimal_capability_token",
+      "description": "Token with only issuer, zone_id, and capability_id",
+      "claims": {
+        "iss": "node:primary",
+        "zone_id": "z:work",
+        "capability_id": "cap:test.read"
+      },
+      "claims_cbor_hex": "__GENERATE__",
+      "token_cbor_hex": "__GENERATE__",
+      "token_cbor_len": "__GENERATE__"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "full_fcp2_capability_token",
+      "description": "Token with standard CWT + FCP2 claims for a Discord send capability",
+      "claims": {
+        "iss": "node:primary",
+        "sub": "agent:claude",
+        "aud": "node:target",
+        "cti_hex": "0102030405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f10",
+        "zone_id": "z:work",
+        "capability_id": "cap:discord.send",
+        "principal_id": "agent:claude",
+        "operations": ["discord.send_message", "discord.read_messages"],
+        "iss_node": "node:primary",
+        "holder_node": "node:mobile"
+      },
+      "claims_cbor_hex": "__GENERATE__",
+      "token_cbor_hex": "__GENERATE__",
+      "token_cbor_len": "__GENERATE__"
+    }
+  ],
+
+  "determinism_properties": [
+    {
+      "name": "claims_order_independent",
+      "description": "BTreeMap ensures claim insertion order does not affect CBOR output"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "signature_deterministic",
+      "description": "Ed25519 is deterministic: same key + same TBS = same signature"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "kid_in_protected_header",
+      "description": "KeyId (BLAKE3 truncated 8 bytes) is in the protected header"
+    }
+  ],
+
+  "verification_test_cases": [
+    {
+      "name": "valid_token_roundtrip",
+      "description": "Sign → serialize → deserialize → verify succeeds"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "wrong_key_fails",
+      "description": "Verify with different public key fails"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "tampered_payload_fails",
+      "description": "Modifying payload bytes after signing fails verification"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "kid_routing",
+      "description": "Protected header KID matches signing key's computed KeyId"
+    }
+  ]
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,132 @@
+{
+  "_comment": "Golden vectors for FCP2 HPKE sealed boxes (RFC 9180)",
+  "_version": "1.0.0",
+  "_generated": "2026-02-27",
+  "_sources": [
+    "FCP2 spec: DHKEM(X25519, HKDF-SHA256) + HKDF-SHA256 + ChaCha20-Poly1305",
+    "AAD = deterministic CBOR(zone_id, recipient_node_id, purpose, issued_at)",
+    "Info string: b\"FCP2-HPKE\""
+  ],
+
+  "profile": {
+    "kem": "DHKEM(X25519, HKDF-SHA256)",
+    "kdf": "HKDF-SHA256",
+    "aead": "ChaCha20-Poly1305",
+    "info": "FCP2-HPKE",
+    "info_hex": "464350322d48504b45"
+  },
+
+  "size_invariants": {
+    "enc_size": 32,
+    "tag_size": 16,
+    "ciphertext_overhead": 16,
+    "description": "ciphertext.len() == plaintext.len() + tag_size"
+  },
+
+  "purpose_strings": [
+    {
+      "name": "ZONE_KEY",
+      "ascii": "FCP2-ZONE-KEY",
+      "hex": "464350322d5a4f4e452d4b4559"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "OBJECTID_KEY",
+      "ascii": "FCP2-OBJECTID-KEY",
+      "hex": "464350322d4f424a45435449442d4b4559"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "OWNER_SHARE",
+      "ascii": "FCP2-OWNER-SHARE",
+      "hex": "464350322d4f574e45522d5348415245"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "SECRET_SHARE",
+      "ascii": "FCP2-SECRET-SHARE",
+      "hex": "464350322d5345435245542d5348415245"
+    }
+  ],
+
+  "aad_encoding_vectors": [
+    {
+      "name": "zone_key_aad",
+      "description": "AAD for zone key distribution to node-123 in z:work",
+      "zone_id_ascii": "z:work",
+      "zone_id_hex": "7a3a776f726b",
+      "recipient_node_id_ascii": "node-123",
+      "recipient_node_id_hex": "6e6f64652d313233",
+      "purpose": "FCP2-ZONE-KEY",
+      "issued_at": 1700000000,
+      "expected_aad_hex": "__GENERATE__"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "objectid_key_aad",
+      "description": "AAD for ObjectId key distribution",
+      "zone_id_ascii": "z:work",
+      "zone_id_hex": "7a3a776f726b",
+      "recipient_node_id_ascii": "node-123",
+      "recipient_node_id_hex": "6e6f64652d313233",
+      "purpose": "FCP2-OBJECTID-KEY",
+      "issued_at": 1700000000,
+      "expected_aad_hex": "__GENERATE__"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "secret_share_aad",
+      "description": "AAD for secret share distribution",
+      "zone_id_ascii": "z:work",
+      "zone_id_hex": "7a3a776f726b",
+      "recipient_node_id_ascii": "node-123",
+      "recipient_node_id_hex": "6e6f64652d313233",
+      "purpose": "FCP2-SECRET-SHARE",
+      "issued_at": 1700000000,
+      "expected_aad_hex": "__GENERATE__"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "owner_share_aad",
+      "description": "AAD for owner share distribution to primary node",
+      "zone_id_ascii": "z:owner",
+      "zone_id_hex": "7a3a6f776e6572",
+      "recipient_node_id_ascii": "node-primary",
+      "recipient_node_id_hex": "6e6f64652d7072696d617279",
+      "purpose": "FCP2-OWNER-SHARE",
+      "issued_at": 1700000000,
+      "expected_aad_hex": "__GENERATE__"
+    }
+  ],
+
+  "aad_sensitivity_properties": [
+    {
+      "name": "zone_id_binding",
+      "description": "Changing zone_id changes AAD → decryption fails"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "recipient_binding",
+      "description": "Changing recipient_node_id changes AAD → decryption fails"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "purpose_binding",
+      "description": "Changing purpose changes AAD → decryption fails"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "timestamp_binding",
+      "description": "Changing issued_at changes AAD → decryption fails"
+    }
+  ],
+
+  "roundtrip_test_cases": [
+    {
+      "name": "empty_plaintext",
+      "plaintext_hex": "",
+      "expected_ciphertext_len": 16
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "short_plaintext",
+      "plaintext_hex": "736563726574",
+      "expected_ciphertext_len": 22
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "zone_key_material",
+      "plaintext_hex": "2a2a2a2a2a2a2a2a2a2a2a2a2a2a2a2a2a2a2a2a2a2a2a2a2a2a2a2a2a2a2a2a",
+      "expected_ciphertext_len": 48
+    }
+  ]
+}
